checked_dimensions.name: spec_compliance
checked_dimensions.evidence: The implementation adds a deterministic specbridge-branch-inventory command that reports local and origin branch refs, branch metadata, prefix counts, merge status, totals, preservation posture, cleanup permission, and branch_mutation_policy=none.

checked_dimensions.name: acceptance_criteria
checked_dimensions.evidence: The command is registered, emits valid JSON, includes required branch fields and totals, is read-only without -OutputPath, writes only .specbridge/branch-inventory/current.inventory.json when requested, requires -Force for replacement, rejects bad output paths, updates artifact inventory, and is documented with explicit no-delete/no-prune/no-rename/no-move/no-archive/no-fetch/no-pull/no-force-push behavior.

checked_dimensions.name: policy_boundaries
checked_dimensions.evidence: All changed files are inside the issue-212 exclusive_write scope. The implementation does not touch workflows, env files, secrets, dependencies, production, billing, authentication, authorization, database, CI/CD security, operator decisions, issue #194, digital twin work, or branch cleanup behavior.

checked_dimensions.name: security_rules
checked_dimensions.evidence: The command uses repository path normalization, writes only the governed branch inventory artifact when explicitly requested, reads local Git refs only, performs no network calls, and performs no branch mutation.

checked_dimensions.name: changed_file_scope
checked_dimensions.evidence: The changed source, docs, dashboard, state, inventory, contract, scope, final report, audit packet, and ChatGPT audit files are all declared in issue-212 scope.

checked_dimensions.name: test_evidence
checked_dimensions.evidence: The CLI regression suite includes branch inventory coverage for command shape, deterministic repeated output, required fields, totals, prefix counts, branch mutation policy, no mutation without -OutputPath, output artifact writing, -Force replacement behavior, and bad OutputPath rejection.

checked_dimensions.name: ci_evidence
checked_dimensions.evidence: Local validation evidence is tracked in the audit packet. GitHub CI remains the authoritative remote gate after PR creation.

checked_dimensions.name: final_report_honesty
checked_dimensions.evidence: The final report records changed files, local validation status, policy result, risk result, unresolved CI and closure risks, merge status, deployment status, and completion status.

findings.evidence: The branch inventory surface explicitly documents that it does not delete, prune, rename, move, archive, fetch, pull, or force-push branches.
findings.recommendation: Keep cleanup permission disabled unless a future dedicated policy and execution contract authorize branch cleanup.

unresolved_risks: GitHub CI pending until PR creation.
Post-merge closure still required after primary merge.
Future branch cleanup remains blocked until a dedicated policy and execution contract authorize it.
